title: boscia cauliflora
intro: Boscia cauliflora, also known as the horse tea bush or horse tea, is a shrub or small tree native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Boscia cauliflora include treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections, as well as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. Boscia cauliflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
